# Feature Inventory Report

**Generated by:** Coder Agent  
**Date:** 2026-03-12  
**Status:** Phase 1 Complete

---

## 5.1 Per-Repository Feature Breakdown

### openclaw-control-center (Reference #1)

| Feature ID | Feature Name | Description | Component/File Location | Estimated Complexity | Priority Suggestion |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| CC-01 | Overview Dashboard | System status, pending items, risks, operational summary | `src/runtime/monitor.ts` | Medium | High |
| CC-02 | Usage Analytics | Token consumption, costs, subscription window | `src/runtime/commander-digest.ts` | High | High |
| CC-03 | Staff/Agent Status | Who's working, who's idle, queue status | `src/runtime/session-conversations.ts` | Medium | High |
| CC-04 | Task Management | Current tasks, approvals, execution chains | `src/runtime/task-store.ts` | High | Medium |
| CC-05 | Memory Workspace | View/edit agent memory files, daily notes | `src/runtime/project-store.ts` | Medium | Medium |
| CC-06 | Health Monitoring | System health checks | `src/runtime/monitor-health.ts` | Low | Medium |

## 5.2 Overlap Analysis

| Feature | openclaw-control-center | openclaw-dashboard | Differences |
|---|---|---|---|
| Agent Status | ✅ Staff page | ✅ Session Management | CC shows queue, OD shows detailed session |
| Usage/Stats | ✅ Usage page | ✅ Cost Analysis + Rate Limits | OD has more detailed breakdowns |
| Memory | ✅ Memory page | ✅ Memory Viewer | Similar functionality |
| Health | ✅ Health checks | ✅ System Health | OD has more metrics (temp, disk) |
| Logs | ❌ | ✅ Log Viewer | Only in OD |
| Cron | ❌ | ✅ Cron Management | Only in OD |
| Theme | ❌ | ✅ Dark/Light | Only in OD |

---

## 5.3 Compatibility Assessment

| Feature | Portable to claw-hive? | Refactoring Needed? | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|
| CC-01 Overview | ✅ Yes | Minimal | Uses existing API |
| CC-02 Usage | ✅ Yes | Medium | Requires usage data parsing |
| CC-03 Staff Status | ✅ Yes | Minimal | Similar to current implementation |
| CC-04 Tasks | ⚠️ Partial | High | Different data model |
| CC-05 Memory | ✅ Yes | Minimal | Uses file system |
| OD-01 Sessions | ✅ Yes | Minimal | Already implemented |
| OD-02 Rate Limits | ✅ Yes | Medium | Requires API parsing |
| OD-03 Cost | ✅ Yes | Medium | Requires cost calculation |
| OD-04 Live Feed | ✅ Yes | Minimal | Uses WebSocket |
| OD-15 Theme | ✅ Yes | None | Already implemented |
| OD-31 Config Editor | ⚠️ Careful | Medium | Security sensitive |

## Recommended Priority for Porting

1. **Phase 1 (High Priority - Already in claw-hive)**
   - Session Management ✅
   - Agent Status ✅
   - Theme Toggle ✅
   - Auto-Refresh ✅

2. **Phase 2 (High Priority - To Port)**
   - Cost Analysis (OD-03)
   - Rate Limit Monitoring (OD-02)
   - Memory Viewer (OD-05)
   - Log Viewer (OD-09)

3. **Phase 3 (Medium Priority)**
   - Config Editor (OD-31)
   - Session Search (OD-14)
   - Lifetime Stats (OD-26)

4. **Phase 4 (Lower Priority)**
   - Docker Management
   - Security Dashboard
   - TOTP MFA
